3050689.label: PL1400_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_4_FIRST
3050689.transcript: First things first. We have to bring him down.

5114994.label: PL1400_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL1200
5114994.transcript: Even the smallest sparrow flies unbound.

9209772.label: PL1400_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_6st_1_FIRST
9209772.transcript: Their numbers are many, but we are mightier.

12732071.label: PL1400_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL0500
12732071.transcript: Strength is built by time and diligence.

13937220.label: PL1400_vo_SP_link_multi_talk2_A_PL0000_2
13937220.transcript: I feel the same about you.

25486550.label: PL1400_vo_SP_charge_speak_2
25486550.transcript: Small wings may beckon a storm.

28498650.label: PL1400_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_8st_1_B
28498650.transcript: I never thought I'd be dueling the Dragon of Destruction.

31640156.label: PL1400_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL1000
31640156.transcript: I do not wield my art. I live it.

32666645.label: PL1400_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL1300
32666645.transcript: On the battlefield, I do not see so much as feel.

39197113.label: PL1400_vo_CMM_emo_pose_2
39197113.transcript: To pierce the skies and shatter the earth.

82821348.label: PL1400_vo_SP_burst_reaction_finish
82821348.transcript: Thank you for keeping our spirits up.

84930318.label: PL1400_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_7_A
84930318.transcript: This is where it ends, Lilith.

93573182.label: PL1400_vo_SP_burst_reaction_overdrive
93573182.transcript: Why? It will only prolong the suffering.

110038052.label: PL1400_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_4st_3_B
110038052.transcript: With one slash, I paint the ground red.

121000039.label: PL1400_vo_SP_burst_reaction_fullchain
121000039.transcript: Harmony is the basis of power.

129401865.label: PL1400_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL1600
129401865.transcript: It was all because you broke their line.

131340751.label: PL1400_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_5_FIRST
131340751.transcript: I need to thank Magliel properly when this is over.

137905780.label: PL1400_vo_SP_link_multi_talk2_B_PL0000_3
137905780.transcript: I trust you with my life.

142918801.label: PL1400_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL1000
142918801.transcript: There is no time for rest.

146646867.label: PL1400_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL0300
146646867.transcript: I shall call on your aid again, Rackam.

146970097.label: PL1400_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_6st_1_B
146970097.transcript: Please get out of our way.

148226500.label: PL1400_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL0900
148226500.transcript: Strong as the earth, and yet gentle as a breeze.

149497548.label: PL1400_vo_SP_link_ms_lose_1st_B
149497548.transcript: Is this really how it ends?

150152057.label: PL1400_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL1600
150152057.transcript: What fierce attacks. You're amazing, Zeta.

150633643.label: PL1400_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_NP0300
150633643.transcript: It's as if your sword is guided by the stars.

154090942.label: PL1400_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL0700
154090942.transcript: We do seem to have a special connection.

169560429.label: PL1400_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_4st_5_A
169560429.transcript: Careful not to trip and fall, or get blown up.

176357061.label: PL1400_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL0700
176357061.transcript: Your mastery of the whip is impressive.

182498197.label: PL1400_vo_ATK_ability_7_kagura_3
182498197.transcript: Swift as thought, certain as death!

193645904.label: PL1400_vo_NAV_enemy_overdrive_reaction_C
193645904.transcript: You're right. They've been lost to anger.

200187630.label: PL1400_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_8st_1_C
200187630.transcript: Hit that dragon with everything you've got!

225459098.label: PL1400_vo_ETC_lockon_5
225459098.transcript: All rivers lead to the sea.

238060885.label: PL1400_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL1000
238060885.transcript: A candle consumes itself while giving light to others.

251131083.label: PL1400_vo_SP_link_multi_talk2_B_3
251131083.transcript: And yet there are still greater heights to climb.

258404217.label: PL1400_vo_SP_burst_reaction_3chain_NP0000
258404217.transcript: Your support means everything to me.

263588800.label: PL1400_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL1000
263588800.transcript: Let's see which of our spirits burns the brighter.

268760894.label: PL1400_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL0100
268760894.transcript: Run, and you hasten toward destiny.

270765527.label: PL1400_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL0800
270765527.transcript: A warrior of virtue needs only one mind.

273780194.label: PL1400_vo_CMM_emo_pose_1
273780194.transcript: To move mountains, one must carry stones.

281045832.label: PL1400_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL0700
281045832.transcript: Even the formless cloud can give rise to a storm.

284631598.label: PL1400_vo_SP_link_ms_lose_5st_1_FIRST
284631598.transcript: You'll pay for what you've done.

294760409.label: PL1400_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_1st_1_FIRST
294760409.transcript: May my blade weave through stormy winds.

302118848.label: PL1400_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL0500
302118848.transcript: Would you like to find out?

305210480.label: PL1400_vo_SP_link_multi_talk2_B_PL0000_2
305210480.transcript: Yes! We were like twin storms!

310377565.label: PL1400_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL0600
310377565.transcript: There is beauty to be found even on the battlefield.

315053847.label: PL1400_vo_CMM_emo_pose_4
315053847.transcript: All journeys begin with a step.

320893494.label: PL1400_vo_ETC_lockon_4
320893494.transcript: The first step decides the course of battle.

323568282.label: PL1400_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_4_A
323568282.transcript: You won't get the best of us!

332312415.label: PL1400_vo_CMM_emo_win_1
332312415.transcript: Master yourself to master your foe.

332620329.label: PL1400_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL0900
332620329.transcript: I was only protecting the crew.

350081879.label: PL1400_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL1800
350081879.transcript: It is the dance of the butterfly.

358383168.label: PL1400_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_2_C
358383168.transcript: It's as if this clash were fated.

364242620.label: PL1400_vo_DUO_rescue2_C_4
364242620.transcript: The squall breaks before morning light.

381758697.label: PL1400_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_3_FIRST
381758697.transcript: I know I've felt this sinister chill before.

386123132.label: PL1400_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL1800
386123132.transcript: Seek the truth, and the world will find you.

389289896.label: PL1400_vo_ETC_quest_clear_1
389289896.transcript: All limits are in the mind.

400079095.label: PL1400_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL0300
400079095.transcript: I must shed all needless movement.

402137868.label: PL1400_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL1900
402137868.transcript: It was your power that got us this far.

402536608.label: PL1400_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_4st_1_B
402536608.transcript: I hope nothing has happened to the Catalyst.

411230416.label: PL1400_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL1300
411230416.transcript: Will I ever be like him?

421361497.label: PL1400_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL0500
421361497.transcript: On the narrow path of war, one misstep leads to certain death.

425382050.label: PL1400_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_7_B
425382050.transcript: This is for all the lives you've uprooted, Lilith.

432615479.label: PL1400_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL1200
432615479.transcript: Only because you did such a wonderful job.

436776982.label: PL1400_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_6_B
436776982.transcript: I won't rest until you're vanquished!

440549901.label: PL1400_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL0500
440549901.transcript: The wizened tree oft has the strongest roots.

447251116.label: PL1400_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_2st_1_B
447251116.transcript: I will not lose to the likes of you.

449339462.label: PL1400_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL0500
449339462.transcript: I follow only the surest road to success.

451791602.label: PL1400_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_2_FIRST
451791602.transcript: Focus on the enemy at hand.

462882737.label: PL1400_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL1200
462882737.transcript: So my form is still wild and undisciplined?

471851149.label: PL1400_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_4st_3_C
471851149.transcript: This won't end well for you.

472143586.label: PL1400_vo_ATK_ability_7_3
472143586.transcript: Swift as thought. Certain as death.

479527154.label: PL1400_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_4st_4_FIRST
479527154.transcript: Did that have any impact at all?

486457362.label: PL1400_vo_CMM_emo_pose_5
486457362.transcript: Before the body, one must forge the mind.

504319731.label: PL1400_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL0200
504319731.transcript: Our current path will lead to victory.

528045542.label: PL1400_vo_CMM_emo_win_4
528045542.transcript: Fate is a current you cannot fight.

541515354.label: PL1400_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_4_C
541515354.transcript: Feel the lash of my blade!

548063495.label: PL1400_vo_SP_link_multi_talk1_A_3
548063495.transcript: I'm so thankful for this crew.

549525171.label: PL1400_vo_SP_link_multi_talk1_C_PL0000_2
549525171.transcript: I'll support you to the bitter end.

557452634.label: PL1400_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL1900
557452634.transcript: Thank you for answering my call.

561851595.label: PL1400_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL1900
561851595.transcript: You're right. I mustn't lose focus.

577752266.label: PL1400_vo_ETC_quest_clear_3
577752266.transcript: Like candlelight kissed by a breeze.

582489292.label: PL1400_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_4st_1_C
582489292.transcript: You dare stand in my way?

584422981.label: PL1400_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL0300
584422981.transcript: Next time, I will finish it in one stroke.

585586834.label: PL1400_vo_SP_link_talk2_C
585586834.transcript: Yes, I must find my center of focus.

593167660.label: PL1400_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_6st_1_C
593167660.transcript: The sins of Avia are unforgivable.

596124332.label: PL1400_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL1600
596124332.transcript: Guarding the sweetest nectar are the sharpest thorns.

602443070.label: PL1400_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL1500
602443070.transcript: A thousand legends aren't worth a single glimpse of your skill.

607369703.label: PL1400_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL1500
607369703.transcript: Mighty as an ox, swift as a falcon.

625860695.label: PL1400_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL0800
625860695.transcript: I had been thinking the same thing.

628403857.label: PL1400_vo_DUO_rescue2_B_PL0000_3
628403857.transcript: To think, I'm supposed to take care of you.

629497143.label: PL1400_vo_NAV_enemy_overdrive_B
629497143.transcript: Watch out for their next attack.

648121335.label: PL1400_vo_DUO_rescue2_C_PL0000
648121335.transcript: Captain, I owe you my life.

667102088.label: PL1400_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_2st_1_FIRST
667102088.transcript: In the blink of an eye, your world fades to black.

691829774.label: PL1400_vo_ETC_lockon_3
691829774.transcript: Enrage the Tigress. Suffer her claws.

705056619.label: PL1400_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_7st_1_C
705056619.transcript: Anything is possible for this crew.

705607056.label: PL1400_vo_CMM_emo_win_5
705607056.transcript: Memory is a sea of clouds.

707394991.label: PL1400_vo_DUO_rescue1_C_PL0000_3
707394991.transcript: Come on, stand up for me.

708018285.label: PL1400_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL0100
708018285.transcript: Big sister will be just fine.

708513453.label: PL1400_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL0100
708513453.transcript: Captain, are you hurt at all?

715682018.label: PL1400_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_1_C
715682018.transcript: My blade cuts pure and true.

718312568.label: PL1400_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL1900
718312568.transcript: That needed more speed, more precision.

721603926.label: PL1400_vo_SP_link_multi_talk1_B_3
721603926.transcript: No one compares to our combined might.

728055709.label: PL1400_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_1_FIRST
728055709.transcript: This has to be a different furikin, right?

728599449.label: PL1400_vo_CMM_emo_pose_6
728599449.transcript: Like the butterfly, we float on fickle winds.

735924394.label: PL1400_vo_CMM_emo_win_3
735924394.transcript: Strike not at flesh, but the will.

749851606.label: PL1400_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL1600
749851606.transcript: My blade is yours as long as you need it.

752225946.label: PL1400_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_2_FIRST
752225946.transcript: These two make a formidable team.

757317144.label: PL1400_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_3_C
757317144.transcript: We can't let Lilith get away!

760440721.label: PL1400_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL0800
760440721.transcript: Let us carve our way through.

773926029.label: PL1400_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_4st_5_C
773926029.transcript: And now for the final act. Let's finish this!

798145851.label: PL1400_vo_SP_link_multi_talk2_C_PL0000_1
798145851.transcript: Right. I was a bit distracted.

798820868.label: PL1400_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL0700
798820868.transcript: I wish you'd let me spoil you some more.

803946951.label: PL1400_vo_SP_link_multi_talk1_C_2
803946951.transcript: Let us prepare for the next battle.

806811920.label: PL1400_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL1100
806811920.transcript: You are fierce and wise as the ancient dragons.

823252244.label: PL1400_vo_DUO_rescue1_C_NP0000
823252244.transcript: I'm sorry I couldn't protect you.

830032317.label: PL1400_vo_SP_link_multi_talk1_C_3
830032317.transcript: There are no heights we cannot scale.

835944449.label: PL1400_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL0500
835944449.transcript: Harmony makes the whole greater than its parts.

862339890.label: PL1400_vo_SP_burst_reaction_weakpoint
862339890.transcript: Win the battle with the fewest blows.

872723118.label: PL1400_vo_DUO_buff_E_PL0000
872723118.transcript: I'll do my best for you.

873919949.label: PL1400_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL1100
873919949.transcript: Like Yin and Yang, there is beauty in the joining of divergent elements.

873967720.label: PL1400_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL1500
873967720.transcript: And just like the sun, it can both nurture and destroy.

887774539.label: PL1400_vo_CMM_emo_win_2
887774539.transcript: Pride is the mother of failure.

888728843.label: PL1400_vo_ETC_lockon_1
888728843.transcript: Big sister will help you fight.

892062908.label: PL1400_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL1500
892062908.transcript: Harmony is the key to success.

896104630.label: PL1400_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_7st_1_B
896104630.transcript: We must part the ominous clouds.

897308238.label: PL1400_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_1_B
897308238.transcript: Machines shall receive no pity from me.

900115331.label: PL1400_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL0200
900115331.transcript: You read the pattern of my movements.

900136049.label: PL1400_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_A
900136049.transcript: None can escape my katana's reach.

903290917.label: PL1400_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_7_C
903290917.transcript: We're going to rip your plans to shreds.

904260603.label: PL1400_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL1100
904260603.transcript: It is an honor to fight at your side, Dragonsbane.

913444652.label: PL1400_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL0900
913444652.transcript: Vane, keep your eyes on the enemy.

918644244.label: PL1400_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL0200
918644244.transcript: I'm not yet worthy to be called a master.

930918552.label: PL1400_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_3_B
930918552.transcript: I will meet your resolve in kind.

934250610.label: PL1400_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL0400
934250610.transcript: How is the pace? Can you keep up?

934832365.label: PL1400_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL1700
934832365.transcript: But wars are won on Unity.

941897717.label: PL1400_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL1700
941897717.transcript: These bad guys aren't so tough with you around.

942122437.label: PL1400_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL0600
942122437.transcript: The loveliest flower must bear the sharpest thorns.

956261500.label: PL1400_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL1200
956261500.transcript: Strength cannot be measured by time or scale.

961646401.label: PL1400_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_6_FIRST
961646401.transcript: You've endangered these skies long enough. Face your death!

962749896.label: PL1400_vo_DUO_rescue1_C_PL0000_2
962749896.transcript: We've got to get you standing.

963992465.label: PL1400_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_4st_2_FIRST
963992465.transcript: We'll have to defeat them one by one.

974197007.label: PL1400_vo_DMG_st_common_3
974197007.transcript: Voice in the body, but not the spirit.

975602041.label: PL1400_vo_SP_burst_reaction_rampage
975602041.transcript: I am still capable of more.

1002735686.label: PL1400_vo_SP_link_multi_talk1_C_PL0000_1
1002735686.transcript: We have to be careful, okay?

1004013406.label: PL1400_vo_DMG_down_3
1004013406.transcript: To fear death is to fear home.

1004933129.label: PL1400_vo_SP_link_multi_talk1_B_1
1004933129.transcript: As the morn cuts the long night.

1013834081.label: PL1400_vo_CMM_emo_pose_3
1013834081.transcript: With a kiss of steel, red flowers bloom.

1014731724.label: PL1400_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_4st_1_FIRST
1014731724.transcript: Oh, Lyria, hold on. We're coming.

1016838322.label: PL1400_vo_NAV_dmg_reaction_PL0000_2
1016838322.transcript: What did they do to you?

1029245551.label: PL1400_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL0300
1029245551.transcript: The course of battle is decided in a single moment.

1031598351.label: PL1400_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL1100
1031598351.transcript: Do you mean that as a compliment?

1035580162.label: PL1400_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_4st_3_FIRST
1035580162.transcript: A true sword master needs only one blade.

1036154012.label: PL1400_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL0300
1036154012.transcript: What? That was my usual footwork.

1043209629.label: PL1400_vo_CMM_emo_no_1
1043209629.transcript: I hate to say no, but...

1051513600.label: PL1400_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL1000
1051513600.transcript: Then, let them carry us to victory.

1058885051.label: PL1400_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL1300
1058885051.transcript: Yodarha, you are a true Bladesmaster.

1060782852.label: PL1400_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_5_FIRST
1060782852.transcript: There must be something we can do.

1062996127.label: PL1400_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL0800
1062996127.transcript: In battle, one does not see so much as foresee.

1069526910.label: PL1400_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_NP0300
1069526910.transcript: So this is the ancient art of the astrals.

17114705.label: PL1400_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL2400
17114705.transcript: Swift as the viper, sturdy as the tree.

44882048.label: PL1400_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL2300
44882048.transcript: Of course, but there are far more impressive techniques in the Sky Realm.

92186416.label: PL1400_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL2900
92186416.transcript: A sword in metamorphosis as the butterfly.

107562914.label: PL1400_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL2600
107562914.transcript: The bond you share with your blade is steadfast and unyielding.

120075113.label: PL1400_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL2500
120075113.transcript: Live by your craft, and the rest will follow.

136571085.label: PL1400_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL0600
136571085.transcript: A dance of blade and rose.

143813085.label: PL1400_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL2400
143813085.transcript: Perhaps once. But those days are over now. Thanks to this crew.

150051396.label: PL1400_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL2900
150051396.transcript: I must do better. Dig deeper.

164859202.label: PL1400_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL2400
164859202.transcript: You have mastery over both speed and power.

205083597.label: PL1400_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL2400
205083597.transcript: Wonderful, Gallanza. Thanks for the assistance.

238830982.label: PL1400_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL2400
238830982.transcript: Training is a mountain, scaled step by step.

243249584.label: PL1400_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL1300
243249584.transcript: It is an honor to receive the commendation of a true master.

276393074.label: PL1400_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL0300
276393074.transcript: Oh, I just like to help wherever I can.

283739729.label: PL1400_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL2600
283739729.transcript: Maybe you should avoid dangerous situations in the first place?

297029276.label: PL1400_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL0700
297029276.transcript: I'm sorry, Beppo. I can't play right now.

333961127.label: PL1400_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL0500
333961127.transcript: No matter the demons I face, I'll slay them all.

335515802.label: PL1400_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL2700
335515802.transcript: Oh dear, I need to take better care of Cappykins.

421339017.label: PL1400_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL2800
421339017.transcript: Of course. I'm right behind you.

423494395.label: PL1400_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL2800
423494395.transcript: All eyes drawn to the flame. Excellent technique!

487285577.label: PL1400_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL1600
487285577.transcript: Limits are meant to be broken.

523872537.label: PL1400_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL2500
523872537.transcript: Ah, older sisters have to be strong, don't they?

555422588.label: PL1400_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL0900
555422588.transcript: Yes, they shall regret crossing our path.

570149938.label: PL1400_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL2500
570149938.transcript: Was that a compliment, I hope?

592011306.label: PL1400_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL0600
592011306.transcript: Wander now into the eternal dream.

606703081.label: PL1400_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL2800
606703081.transcript: And the butterfly calls when the blossom flowers.

677140459.label: PL1400_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL2300
677140459.transcript: I wonder if you could hit an apple from across the skydom.

681103366.label: PL1400_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL0200
681103366.transcript: Katalina, that was a perfect combination.

693732208.label: PL1400_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL1700
693732208.transcript: Right. We must try to keep our wits, in all things.

702228473.label: PL1400_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL2800
702228473.transcript: Where life finds boundary, knowledge finds purchase.

702565081.label: PL1400_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL2500
702565081.transcript: All who oppose us shall be cut in twain.

714545936.label: PL1400_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL2700
714545936.transcript: It's darkest before dawn, but eventually peace will come.

721890717.label: PL1400_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL2900
721890717.transcript: The night unfolds true. You are darkness itself.

725733662.label: PL1400_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL2600
725733662.transcript: Ready yourself for the next fight.

734139627.label: PL1400_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL0900
734139627.transcript: Joy is manifest in harmony and discord alike.

738240486.label: PL1400_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL2600
738240486.transcript: Nope. You did very good, Beatrix.

745058036.label: PL1400_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL1000
745058036.transcript: I must be swifter. I must be sharper.

747755969.label: PL1400_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL2700
747755969.transcript: I'm grateful for your help, Eustace.

755039046.label: PL1400_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL2900
755039046.transcript: But your powers are so deep, so mysterious. I wonder if my techniques will ever compare.

761097806.label: PL1400_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL0200
761097806.transcript: Restraint is a form of discipline, especially in times of calm.

773727962.label: PL1400_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL0800
773727962.transcript: The pine bends not to the blizzard.

785409757.label: PL1400_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL2100
785409757.transcript: Your blade splits the heavens and rends the earth.

790979578.label: PL1400_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL2900
790979578.transcript: Discipline and training have given me strength. Strength to overcome any obstacle.

805791084.label: PL1400_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL2500
805791084.transcript: I'm just glad I could keep up with you.

898580465.label: PL1400_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL2700
898580465.transcript: Even a deadly art can be a thing of beauty.

938912067.label: PL1400_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL1500
938912067.transcript: With roaring spirit, his best eclipses all who mean to stop him.

946670549.label: PL1400_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL2800
946670549.transcript: We do? I mean yes, we do!

965716552.label: PL1400_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL1900
965716552.transcript: The fool who realizes his own ignorance is no fool.

989933343.label: PL1400_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL2900
989933343.transcript: I'm not sure, but I don't know anyone as tall as you.

1002747014.label: PL1400_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL1100
1002747014.transcript: With Siegfried at our side, we have nothing to fear.

1006422009.label: PL1400_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL1300
1006422009.transcript: A true master of the art. I've much to learn.

1011239314.label: PL1400_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL0700
1011239314.transcript: There, there. You can chase them afterwards all you like.

1020647483.label: PL1400_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL0400
1020647483.transcript: I will become stronger. I swear it.

1024324851.label: PL1400_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL1000
1024324851.transcript: We are a force that cannot be stopped.

1029549539.label: PL1400_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL2500
1029549539.transcript: You had them before I could even slash!

1030647078.label: PL1400_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL2100
1030647078.transcript: Even a flap of the butterfly's wing may summon a storm.

1054985583.label: PL1400_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL2900
1054985583.transcript: The flash of my steel cuts through any darkness.

1060735920.label: PL1400_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL2700
1060735920.transcript: My katana becomes like wind, cleaving lightning in twain.

1065096926.label: PL1400_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL1500
1065096926.transcript: That's a lesson I needed to hear.

74570231.label: PL1400_vo_CMM_emo_pushup_1
74570231.transcript: Steal the body, temper the mind. One, two, three, four, five, six. Consistency is key.

152174062.label: PL1400_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL2300
152174062.transcript: I bow to your bow skills.

366122017.label: PL1400_vo_CMM_emo_pushup_2
366122017.transcript: Time for training. That's enough for today.

370157139.label: PL1400_vo_CMM_emo_squat_1
370157139.transcript: One, two, three, four, five, six.

430088010.label: PL1400_vo_CMM_emo_squat_2
430088010.transcript: One, two, three, four, five, six.

452057036.label: PL1400_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL2200
452057036.transcript: Well, that couldn't have gone better.

559175185.label: PL1400_vo_CMM_emo_abs_3
559175185.transcript: This is for your own good. That wasn't so bad. Thank you.

675796097.label: PL1400_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL2200
675796097.transcript: I could say the same for you.

730436099.label: PL1400_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL2200
730436099.transcript: That's the nicest thing anyone has ever said to me.

796753443.label: PL1400_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL2200
796753443.transcript: I'll prove myself during the next fight.

922999339.label: PL1400_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL2300
922999339.transcript: Thank you. To think an Eternal would take notice of me.

1071828357.label: PL1400_vo_CMM_emo_abs_1
1071828357.transcript: Ah, shall I begin? One... Two... Three... Four... Five... Six... Oh my, I feel the burn.

80791239.label: PL1400_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL2100
80791239.transcript: That's very sweet of you, Sandalphon.

714777468.label: PL1400_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL2100
714777468.transcript: I'll face whatever stands in our way.

67134477.label: PL1400_vo_CMM_emo_onigiri_2
67134477.transcript: I am rather famished. Needs a little salt. How about seconds?

403185247.label: PL1400_vo_CMM_emo_onigiri_3
403185247.transcript: My stomach is empty. I could eat a million of these.
